indexes.comment: Backs LeadService.leads and the All-leads table with no source/status filter — filter by organizationId, order by createdAt. Firestore requires this composite index for the equality + orderBy query.
All-leads table filtered by source only (LeadService.fetchLeadsPage): organizationId + source equality, order by createdAt.
All-leads table filtered by status only (LeadService.fetchLeadsPage): organizationId + status equality, order by createdAt.
All-leads table filtered by source AND status (LeadService.fetchLeadsPage): organizationId + source + status equality, order by createdAt.
